chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-2911 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 17.9.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2023, which is over two years ago. It was last taken up on 10.10.2023, which is almost two years ago when counsel was directed to get correct paging done in the duplicate file. Learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently in the last two year. It is unclear whether he has even complied with the order dated 10.10.2023 or not. Today, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
